allow: Bash(gh pr create --base master --head fix/docker-backend-copy-tsconfig-base --title 'fix\(deploy\): copy tsconfig.base.json into backend build' --body ' *)
PowerShell($c = Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c.Source; gh --version } else { "gh-not-found" })

PowerShell($mgrs = @{}; foreach \($m in 'winget','choco','scoop'\) { $c = Get-Command $m -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $mgrs[$m] = if \($c\) { $c.Source } else { 'not-found' } }; $mgrs.GetEnumerator\(\) | ForEach-Object { "{0}: {1}" -f $_.Key, $_.Value })

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); $c = Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c.Source; gh --version } else { "gh still not on PATH" })
